allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./database'\); console.log\('DB OK'\); const db = require\('./database'\); console.log\('Tickets table:', db.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='tickets'\\"\).get\(\)\); console.log\('Quick replies:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) as c FROM quick_replies'\).get\(\)\); console.log\('Users with role column:', db.prepare\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\(users\)\\"\).all\(\).map\(c => c.name\).join\(','\)\);")
Bash(node -e "process.env.PORT='0'; const app = require\('./server'\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 1500\);")
